levels.name: Stadium Circuit
levels.author: BREACH
levels.desc: A closed stadium oval with barrier walls — 3 laps against 2 AI rivals. The tutorial race, ready to run.

levels.name: Crate Yard Arena
levels.author: BREACH
levels.desc: Scattered crates and five pillars — classic wave combat. Win after 3 waves.

levels.name: The Curator's Vault
levels.author: BREACH
levels.desc: A locked vault, a hidden gold key, and a Curator who knows more than he says. No enemies — just the puzzle.
